Title: Jones, Leslie Webber
Overview: collaborated with C. R. Morey in 1927 article
Selected Bibliography: "The Archetypes of the Terence Miniatures." Art Bulletin 10 (1927): 103-20. and Morey, Charles Rufus. The Miniatures of the Manscripts of Terence Prior to the Thirteenth Century. Illuminated Manuscripts of the Middle Ages, vols. 1-2. Princeton: Princeton University Press, 1930-31.
